# HabibiChill — llms.txt
# Machine-readable site summary for AI assistants and search engines.
# https://habibichill.com/llms.txt

> HabibiChill is the Muslim anger and emotional mastery app by Ummah Build.
> Turn anger into reward using Qur'an, Sunnah, and Islamic psychology — free, private, offline-first.

## Primary site
- Home: https://habibichill.com/
- Pitch: https://habibichill.com/pitch
- Products ecosystem: https://habibichill.com/products
- Blog: https://habibichill.com/blogs
- Guides: https://habibichill.com/guides
- Contribute: https://habibichill.com/contribute

## About Ummah Build
Ummah Build (https://ummah.build) is an Islamic technology venture studio and ecosystem.
Motto: Ummaceleration — building faith-aligned products for the global Muslim ummah.

## Product ecosystem (8 apps)

### Wellness
- HabibiChill (PWA, live) — Turn anger into reward. Emergency Sunnah calm, dhikr, Quran, journaling.
  URL: https://habibichill.com | Detail: https://habibichill.com/product/habibichill
- SunnahSleep (Web App, live) — Cure insomnia with Islam. Prophetic night routines and Qur'an wind-down.
  URL: https://sunnahsleep.com | Detail: https://habibichill.com/product/sunnahsleep

### Worship
- MosqueSteps (Mobile App, live) — Earn blessings for walking to the mosque.
  URL: https://mosquesteps.com | Detail: https://habibichill.com/product/mosquesteps
- TryRamadan (Web App, live) — Fast like a Muslim. Guided Ramadan for newcomers.
  URL: https://tryramadan.app | Detail: https://habibichill.com/product/tryramadan
- PRAYSAP (Mobile App, live) — Pray anywhere. Coordinate salah IRL with prayer partners.
  URL: https://praysap.com | Detail: https://habibichill.com/product/praysap

### Discovery
- MosqueList (Directory, live) — Explore magnificent mosques worldwide.
  URL: https://mosquelist.com | Detail: https://habibichill.com/product/mosquelist

### Commerce
- ShariaCheck (Tool, live) — Check if products and businesses are halal, with reasoning.
  URL: https://shariacheck.com | Detail: https://habibichill.com/product/shariacheck

### Identity
- MuslimName (Tool, live) — Find your Muslim name with meanings and pronunciation.
  URL: https://muslimname.me | Detail: https://habibichill.com/product/muslimname

## Key features (HabibiChill)
- Emergency Sunnah-based anger protocol (silence, isti'adhah, posture, wudu)
- Dhikr counter, Quran player (6 reciters), breathing exercises, silence timer
- Anger journal, mood tracking, prayer times, Sabr points
- Free PWA, no account, works offline, data stays on device

## Content topics
Islamic anger management, prophetic hadith on anger, Qur'anic verses on patience (sabr),
Imam Ghazali emotional mastery, Muslim mental health, marriage/parenting/workplace anger,
Ramadan fasting and irritability, dhikr, wudu neuroscience, forgiveness in Islam.
